rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Gov't Code §2166.302, which governs uniform general conditions for state building construction contracts. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 2166.302. ADOPTION OF CONDITIONS. (a) Except as provided by Subsections (b) and (c), the commission shall adopt uniform general conditions to be incorporated into all building construction contracts made by the state
_note: Rule text concerns state building construction contracts; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No intersection between the two provisions.
